title: Senior Interior Designer
description:
Job Description:

  • Manage multiple design projects simultaneously and ensure design are timely deliver to project requirements.
  • Coordinate with the rest of the designers including project team and stakeholders to ensure design requirements are met.
  • Manage space planning, design conceptualization, detailed technical drawing and able to advise on materials selection
  • Rendered colour proof and mock-up

Job Requirements:

  • Degree in Interior Design/Architecture or related studies
  • Minimum 8 years of experience in design luxury hospitality industry.
  • Experiences in graphic design is a plus
  • Able to work and communication with the team members
  • Positive attitude and takes pride in the project



More about us: https://www.ccd.com.hk/

postedCompany.description:
CCD/Cheng Chung Design (HK) was founded by Mr. Joe Cheng, specializing in providing interior design and consulting services for top international brand hotels. CCD’s elite team, with its detailed design knowledge, international experience, and management skills, is poised to provide top quality services and product to its clients.  The diverse background of the team and its technological expertise allows it to keep abreast of new directions and innovations in the industry. CCD is ranked as #1 in TOP 10 Hospitality in US Interior Design Magazine in 2022. CCD received the "Top 500 Asian Brands" honor in 2019 and 2020. Also, it was listed on the "Top 500 Most Valuable Brands of China" in 2020, with a brand valuation of 9.758 billion, becoming the first and only design brand on the two lists. CCD gathers Chinese elites from all over the world. With their innate oriental cultural background, extensive international education and excellent work experience, the unique value of perfection was injected into each design work and became the symbol of CCD.


Under the leadership of Mr. Joe Cheng, the CCD design teams are based in Hong Kong, Shenzhen, Los Angeles, Beijing, Shanghai, Bangkok etc., which is one of the most dynamic and visionary teams in the global Chinese field. Since establishment, CCD has awarded more than a hundred of top-notched international design awards including the highest honor in the interior design field – Gold Key Awards, becoming the first Chinese interior designer who has won a grand slam in the hospitality design field.
CCD's design scope extends beyond hotels, encompassing various formats such as high-end private residences, boutique warehouses, brand catering, fashion show venue, cultural and creative spaces, urban public buildings, cultural venues, and corporate headquarters, among others. The scope of business has also expanded from interior design to architecture design, landscaping, FF&E, and artworks.
postedCompany.name: CHENG CHUNG DESIGN PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
